steps.name: I am on the search results page
I add the "Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 15.6in N100 4GB 128GB Laptop" to the basket
I should see the "Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 15.6in N100 4GB 128GB Laptop" in the basket
I am on the basket page
I update the product quantity to '4'
I should see '3' in the product quantity field
